div.p: Balancing Recovery Time vs Runtime Overhead

ul.li: Higher SLA tolerance → Less frequent checkpoints → Lower overhead
Stricter SLA → More frequent checkpoints → Higher overhead

div.p: The optimal checkpoint interval depends on your Recovery Time Objective (RTO):

ul.li: High-Availability: 5-10 second intervals (RTO ~10s, overhead ~3-5%) There is no universally optimal point — tune based on your specific SLA requirements and resource costs.
